examples.name: color-math-chart resonance
examples.claim: A color mark in a math procedure and a color band in a symbolic chart can be linked if they occupy equivalent transformation roles.
examples.test: verify same role: input/operator/intermediate/output/recovery and repeat across samples

examples.name: letter-as-field
examples.claim: A letter can be addressed by glyph, sound, decimal, binary, morse, braille, codon, prime, and semantic use.
examples.test: encode/decode round trip and preserve identity across representations
